description_en: Temple gate of Busshō-ji, Kongō-in, Mount Renge is a tangible cultural property (structure). It was ward-designated by Toshima Ward on June 27, 1994. It is located at Nagasaki 1-9-2.

description_en: Implements for Fujimoto festival music (9 instruments and 11 items for the celebratory lion and Daikoku dances) is a tangible folk cultural property. It was ward-designated by Toshima Ward on September 27, 2002. It is located at Kaname 1-38-9.
